title: Factorized Ores
description: Tired of looking for ores in mines? well this mod adds a block that you can factorize to generate infinite minerals
body:
# Renewable Resources - RR

![Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6167e1a208769714b8ad7dd9c75a3719d91c3f9.png)

This mod introduces a block called Infinity Stone that regenerates after being harvested or exploded, and will drop minerals and cobblestone.

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7027b9b7f20d91d95043f020157776608bc6a4f.png)

- The block can only be mined with a pickaxe.
- When mined, the block drops a single item selected by weighted probabilities:
  - 80% Cobblestone
  - 20% Minerals: coal, iron ingot, gold ingot, redstone, lapis, or diamond
- Fortune enchantment affects only mineral drops, not cobblestone.
- Experience (XP) is granted for certain drops: coal, redstone, lapis, and diamond, typically 2–4 XP.
  - If a hopper is located within 3 blocks below the block, XP can be bottled into XP bottles in that hopper.
  - Without a suitable hopper, XP spawns as XP orbs.
- The block can be permanently obtained only by right-clicking with an empty hand (both hands must be empty).
